risk_level.citation: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 4: risk_level: HIGH. Correct — touches Knowledge Bus package manifests (governance metadata) and creates governed registers. Package paths are not in the §10 HIGH-trigger list verbatim, but HIGH is conservative and appropriate given 10 packages in scope.

execution_model.citation: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 5: execution_model: TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. Correct — produces governed artefacts requiring kernel lifecycle.

change_type.citation: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 6: change_type: MIXED. Correct — governance registers (CONTENT) plus potential package manifest metadata changes that sit in the SignalRegistry scan path (knowledge_bus/packages/*/signal_library.yaml per pass3_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml line 51). MIXED governs.

package_list_match.citation: Prompt lines 126-135 lists 10 cleared packages. batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml batch2_promote_1_scope.include_packages (lines 11-21) lists the same 10 packages. Sets are identical. Minor ordering difference for eosinophils_abs entries (items 5/6 swapped between prompt in-scope list vs. register) — functionally irrelevant.

excluded_package_list_match.citation: Prompt lines 144-155 lists 10 excluded packages. batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml exclude_packages (lines 23-31) lists the same 10 packages. All 10 are androgen (8) + eGFR (2). Sets identical.

package_directories_on_disk.citation: All 10 cleared package directories confirmed present via PowerShell Get-ChildItem on knowledge_bus/packages/. Each contains: package_manifest.yaml, promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml, research_brief.yaml, signal_library.yaml.

activation_key_collision_check.citation: batch2_promotion_readiness_register_v1.yaml shows collision_status: none for all 10 cleared packages. Verified per-package: ck_high_exertional line 57, ck_high_persistent line 79, eosinophil_pct_reactive line 196, eosinophil_pct_secondary line 219, eosinophils_abs_hypereosinophilic line 242, eosinophils_abs_reactive line 265, free_t3_high line 338, free_t3_low line 361, free_t4_high line 384, free_t4_low line 407. No collision in egfr excluded packages either (those carry collision_status: requires_adjudication, correctly excluded).

thyroid_activation_constraint.citation: batch2_final_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml line 43: 'further_review_before_promote_subset: Clinical sign-off for thyroid before activation; promotion sprint may compile/promote cleared packages without activation.' All 4 thyroid packages (free_t3_high, free_t3_low, free_t4_high, free_t4_low) have final_decision: CLEARED but activation is NOT authorised. Prompt lines 220-229 and STOP condition at line 375 correctly handle this. runtime_activation_changed must be false for all thyroid packages in the execution register.

promotion_mechanism_status.citation: pass3_promotion_decision_register_v1.yaml line 51: 'runtime_authority_mechanism: SignalRegistry scans knowledge_bus/packages/*/signal_library.yaml and resolves activation identity as signal_id::source_spec_id'. The 10 cleared packages are physically resident in this scan path (confirmed above). The 'compiled_not_promoted/inactive' designation is tracked via governance registers only — there is no structural runtime barrier in the current system. Cursor must determine: (a) whether 'promotion' means adding manifest-level metadata only (governance act), or (b) whether any runtime-relevant mechanism changes. STOP condition in prompt covers this. Do not guess.

signal_library_description_discrepancy.citation: signal_library.yaml for pkg_kb47_creatine_kinase_high_exertional_muscle_injury line 6: description references 'Batch_2_Pass_3_Rev1.json' (pre-provenance-correction name). package_manifest.yaml source_document correctly references canonical Batch_2_Pass_3.json (updated by PASS3-BATCH2-PROVENANCE-1). The signal_library.yaml description string is cosmetic/non-functional. package_validator_status: PASS per decision register. Out of scope for this sprint — do not modify signal_library.yaml.

forbidden_files.citation: Runtime boundary (prompt lines 357-375) prohibits: SignalEvaluator, SignalRegistry, runtime loaders, domain_score_assembler, report_compiler, frontend, SSOT, scoring thresholds, unit conversion. Excluded packages must not be touched. Sprint scope (governance register + audit report + carry-forward update + conditional manifest metadata) does not require touching any forbidden files.

behavioural_scope.regression_targets: Architecture gate (run_architecture_validation_gate.py) must pass pre- and post-change. All 10 cleared package validators (validate_knowledge_package.py) must pass pre- and post-change. validate_medical_frame_identity_index.py and validate_context_modifier_catalogue.py required per prompt lines 339-343.
behavioural_scope.runtime_activation: NOT_PERMITTED — promotion only, no activation. Thyroid constraint enforced by decision register line 43. All runtime_activation_changed fields in execution register must be false.

overall_verdict.citation: All 5 front matter fields valid and confirmed. All 8 required input governance files confirmed present or verified content. All 10 cleared package directories confirmed on disk. All 10 excluded packages verified against decision register. All 10 activation keys confirmed collision-free. All 4 required validator scripts confirmed present. Carry-forward register state verified consistent with prompt instructions. Runtime boundary clean. Two advisories surfaced: (1) promotion mechanism ambiguity — adequately protected by STOP condition in prompt; (2) thyroid runtime activation prohibition — adequately protected by prompt lines 220-229 and STOP condition. No blockers. Pre-execution token absent — kernel Stage 3 start required before Cursor touches any file.
